technology.title: US FCC reviewing Disney's ABC station licenses after Kimmel joke - Reuters
technology.summary: US FCC reviewing Disney's ABC station licenses after Kimmel joke Reuters

briefing.news_focus: US FCC reviewing Disney's ABC station licenses after Kimmel joke Reuters
briefing.news_focus_zh: 美國聯邦通信委員會（FCC）正在審查迪士尼旗下ABC電視台的執照，原因是喜劇演員吉米·基梅爾在節目中對梅拉尼亞·特朗普的玩笑引發爭議。基梅爾的玩笑稱梅拉尼亞為「懷孕的寡婦」，隨後FCC迅速展開了對該電視台執照的檢討。
briefing.background: 美國的廣播電視執照由FCC負責管理，該機構有權對違反公共利益的行為進行調查。近年來，政治言論在媒體上的影響力日益增強，尤其是在社交媒體和即時反應的環境中。基梅爾的玩笑不僅引發了觀眾的討論，也引起了特朗普及其支持者的強烈反彈，這使得FCC的審查行動更具爭議性。
briefing.analysis: 此事件反映了美國媒體環境中政治與娛樂的交織。FCC的審查可能會對ABC的運營造成影響，尤其是在政治敏感的時期。基梅爾的玩笑引發的反應顯示出特朗普支持者對媒體批評的敏感性，這可能會促使FCC在未來對類似事件的處理更加謹慎。參考報導指出，FCC的行動是在基梅爾的玩笑之後立即展開的，這表明該機構可能受到政治壓力的影響。不同報導的重點在於，Ars Technica強調了玩笑對特朗普及其妻子的冒犯性，而主新聞則較為中立地報導了審查的事實。

supporting_titles: FCC orders review of ABC licenses after Kimmel joke offends Trump and first lady
supporting_summaries: Kimmel joke calling Melania an "expectant widow" followed quickly by FCC order.

technology.title: China social media account banned for forcing women to stay in tank with crocodile
technology.summary: A social media account in China with more than 11 million followers which targets juveniles has been banned for forcing young female live-streamers to stay in a tank with a crocodile. The permanent ban also came after the account was exposed of also having made the women hold their breath under water. The account with the handle @Yebali, which means Night Paris in English, had been in operation on the social media platform for five years before it bowed to pressure to close, Jiupai News...

briefing.news_focus: A social media account in China with more than 11 million followers which targets juveniles has been banned for forcing young female live-streamers to stay in a tank with a crocodile. The permanent ban also came after the account was exposed of also having made the women hold their breath under water. The account with the handle @Yebali, which means Night Paris in English, had been in operation on the social media platform for five years before it bowed to pressure to close, Jiupai News...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 中國一個擁有超過1100萬追隨者的社交媒體帳號因強迫年輕女性直播者與鱷魚同處於水箱中而被永久禁止。該帳號名為@Yebali（夜巴黎），在社交媒體平台運營了五年，近期因受到壓力而關閉。報導指出，該帳號還曾要求女性在水下屏住呼吸，這一行為引發了廣泛的譴責。
briefing.background: 在中國，社交媒體平台的內容監管日益嚴格，特別是針對青少年的內容。隨著直播文化的興起，許多帳號為了吸引觀眾，常常採取極端或危險的行為來增加觀看率。這種現象引發了社會對於青少年保護的關注，尤其是在涉及身體安全和心理健康的情況下。中國政府也在加強對於這類帳號的監管，以防止不當行為的發生。
briefing.analysis: 該事件突顯了社交媒體平台在內容監管方面的挑戰與責任。對於@Yebali帳號的關閉，反映出社會對於青少年安全的重視，並可能促使其他平台加強對類似行為的監控。此事件也可能引發更廣泛的討論，關於直播文化的道德界限及其對年輕人的影響。儘管目前沒有其他報導提供補充細節，但這一事件的曝光可能促使政府進一步加強對社交媒體內容的規範，並對違規帳號施加更嚴厲的懲罰。

technology.title: Elon Musk Testifies That He Started OpenAI to Prevent a ‘Terminator Outcome’
technology.summary: The judge also warned Musk and Sam Altman to curb their “propensity to use social media to make things worse outside the courtroom” after both sides traded attacks online.

briefing.news_focus: The judge also warned Musk and Sam Altman to curb their “propensity to use social media to make things worse outside the courtroom” after both sides traded attacks online.
briefing.news_focus_zh: Elon Musk 在針對 OpenAI 的訴訟中作證，表示他創立 OpenAI 的初衷是為了防止出現類似《終結者》的災難性結果。法官同時警告 Musk 和 OpenAI CEO Sam Altman，要求他們控制在法庭外使用社交媒體的傾向，因為雙方在網上互相攻擊。
briefing.background: Elon Musk 是 OpenAI 的共同創辦人之一，該公司以開發 ChatGPT 而聞名。Musk 早期投資了高達 3800 萬美元，但隨著對公司結構和使命的分歧，與其他創辦人的關係惡化。Musk 現在要求超過 1300 億美元的賠償，這顯示出他對 OpenAI 現狀的不滿及其對未來人工智慧發展的擔憂。此案件引發了對人工智慧倫理及其潛在風險的廣泛討論。
briefing.analysis: Musk 和 Altman 之間的衝突反映了對人工智慧發展方向的根本分歧。Musk 擔心人工智慧的潛在危險，主張應加強監管，而 Altman 則可能更傾向於推動技術創新和商業化。根據 BBC 的報導，Musk 要求的賠償金額顯示出他對 OpenAI 當前運作的不滿，並可能試圖透過法律途徑重新獲得對公司的影響力。The Verge 的報導強調了三位創辦人之間的關係惡化，這不僅是個人之間的衝突，也反映了科技行業內部對於企業治理和倫理責任的深層次爭議。未來，這場訴訟可能會對人工智慧的發展政策及行業規範產生重要影響。

supporting_titles: Why Elon Musk and Sam Altman are fighting over OpenAI
Elon Musk takes the stand in high-profile trial against OpenAI
supporting_summaries: Musk, who co-founded the company that created ChatGPT with Altman, wants more than $130bn in damages.

Elon Musk officially began his testimony in the trial he has brought against OpenAI CEO Sam Altman and company president Greg Brockman. The three were on the initial founding team of OpenAI, with Musk investing up to $38 million early on before the co-founders' relationship soured over disagreements over company structure and mission, including whether […]

politics.title: US economic gap over China to widen, but Iran might bring them closer: former UN official
politics.summary: The economic divide between the United States and China is projected to widen to US$11 trillion by the end of the decade, yet escalating geopolitics – specifically the war in Iran and the ongoing Strait of Hormuz crisis – could inadvertently act as a stabilising force for bilateral ties, according to a prominent global strategist. Kishore Mahbubani, former president of the UN Security Council and once a top diplomat from Singapore, has forecast that the gross-domestic-product disparity between...

briefing.news_focus: The economic divide between the United States and China is projected to widen to US$11 trillion by the end of the decade, yet escalating geopolitics – specifically the war in Iran and the ongoing Strait of Hormuz crisis – could inadvertently act as a stabilising force for bilateral ties, according to a prominent global strategist. Kishore Mahbubani, former president of the UN Security Council and once a top diplomat from Singapore, has forecast that the gross-domestic-product disparity between...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 根據前聯合國官員基肖爾·馬哈布巴尼的預測，到2030年底，美國與中國之間的經濟差距將擴大至11萬億美元。然而，伊朗的戰爭及霍爾木茲海的危機可能會意外地成為穩定雙邊關係的力量。馬哈布巴尼指出，這些地緣政治因素可能促使美中兩國在某些議題上展開合作。
briefing.background: 美國與中國之間的經濟競爭持續升溫，兩國在貿易、科技及地緣政治等多方面的對抗愈演愈烈。根據馬哈布巴尼的觀察，這種競爭將在未來幾年內進一步加劇，尤其是在美國對中國的政策上，可能會導致經濟差距的擴大。另一方面，伊朗的戰爭及霍爾木茲海的局勢也在影響全球能源市場，進一步加劇了地緣政治的緊張局勢。
briefing.analysis: 馬哈布巴尼的觀點指出，儘管美中之間的經濟差距將持續擴大，但伊朗的局勢可能會迫使兩國在某些方面進行合作，特別是在穩定能源供應及地區安全上。參考報導中提到，美國應考慮解除對伊朗的封鎖，以促進霍爾木茲海的通行，這可能會影響美國在中東的戰略布局。另一方面，另一報導則指出中國對伊朗的支持正在加強，這可能會使美中之間的競爭更加複雜。這些因素共同塑造了未來美中關係的動態，顯示出在競爭與合作之間的微妙平衡。

supporting_titles: ​Battle of wills: On the U.S. war on Iran
Helping Iran, China Is a Party in the War
supporting_summaries: The U.S. should lift its blockade so that Iran can open the Strait of Hormuz
Several reports in recent weeks have revealed the extent of China’s active support for Iran.

politics.title: Wednesday briefing: Where Starmer stands after another precarious day in parliament
politics.summary: In today’s newsletter: As Labour braces for heavy local election losses, senior figures ​are signalling unease and​ morale ​is sinking​, can the prime minister hang on? Good morning. Keir Starmer is on thin ice. The prime minister survived a bruising Tuesday in the Commons as MPs continued to scrutinise his account of the decision to appoint Peter Mandelson as US ambassador. Almost all Labour MPs backed Starmer in a key vote on whether he should face an inquiry into whether he misled parliament. But in Westminster there is a growing feeling that the Labour leader is on borrowed time. Next week’s local and parliamentary elections, which Starmer will face as one of the most unpopular prime ministers since records began, is likely to see public dissatisfaction crystallise. “He’s in last chance saloon,” one minister said after last night’s vote. US | King Charles has extolled the importance of Britain’s “special relationship” with the US in a speech to Congress that made pointed reference to the importance of Nato, the defence of Ukraine and the climate crisis. Middle East | Britain is facing a £35bn economic hit and the risk of a recession this year as the fallout from the Iran war adds to the pressure on Keir Starmer’s government, the National Institute of Economic and Social Research (Niesr) has warned. Oil | The UAE has quit the Opec oil cartel after 60 years of membership, in a heavy blow to the group and its de facto leader, Saudi Arabia, as global energy markets contend with the biggest supply crisis in history. UK news | The chair of NatWest was forced to defend the bank against accusations of “climate backtracking” at a chaotic annual shareholder meeting, which was temporarily suspended owing to singing protesters. Women’s rights | Fifa has given permission for Afghan Women United – a squad composed of refugees scattered around the world in Australia, the Middle East and Europe – to represent Afghanistan in official competitions without requiring the approval of the Taliban , which banned the team. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus_zh: 英國首相基爾·斯塔默（Keir Starmer）在國會面臨重大壓力，尤其是針對他任命彼得·曼德爾森（Peter Mandelson）為美國大使的決定。儘管大多數工黨議員在關鍵投票中支持他，國會內部卻出現對其領導地位的懷疑聲音。隨著即將到來的地方及國會選舉，斯塔默的支持率創下歷史新低，許多觀察者認為他正處於「最後機會」的境地。
briefing.background: 目前英國正面臨經濟挑戰，包括因伊朗戰爭導致的350億英鎊經濟損失和潛在的衰退風險。這些因素進一步加大了斯塔默政府的壓力。工黨在即將舉行的地方選舉中可能遭遇重大損失，這使得斯塔默的領導地位受到質疑。此外，斯塔默的前首席幕僚已對曼德爾森的任命表示歉意，承認這是一個「嚴重錯誤」，進一步加深了外界對其決策能力的懷疑。
briefing.analysis: 在這一背景下，斯塔默的領導地位面臨多重挑戰。工黨內部對於即將到來的選舉結果感到不安，許多高層人士對其未來表示擔憂。參考報導指出，斯塔默的前首席幕僚對曼德爾森的任命表示歉意，這可能會加劇外界對斯塔默的質疑。各方對於斯塔默的支持與反對聲音交織，部分工黨成員認為他應該承擔更多責任，而其他人則擔心更換領導人可能導致更大的不穩定。隨著選舉的臨近，斯塔默必須迅速提升其支持率，否則可能面臨更大的政治危機。

supporting_titles: Starmer’s ex-chief of staff says sorry over Mandelson appointment as UK leader faces more pressure
Player says FIFA has made mockery of policy
supporting_summaries: U.K. Prime Minister Keir Starmer’s former chief of staff says that he made a “serious mistake” by recommending Peter Mandelson’s appointment as U.K. ambassador to the United States

politics.title: US in tough spot as it tries to avoid deal that highlights its failures in Iran
politics.summary: Washington facing long economic war or risky military action to reopen strait of Hormuz – which may now be more valuable to Iran than a nuclear weapon Donald Trump is learning first-hand about the perils of mission creep. The US-Israel war in Iran has just passed its eighth week – twice as long as the president predicted it would take when US warplanes launched their joint attack with Israeli forces to decapitate the Iranian leadership and paralyse its military. The military attacks were successful. The predictions about the political cause-and-effect to follow were not. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: Washington facing long economic war or risky military action to reopen strait of Hormuz – which may now be more valuable to Iran than a nuclear weapon Donald Trump is learning first-hand about the perils of mission creep. The US-Israel war in Iran has just passed its eighth week – twice as long as the president predicted it would take when US warplanes launched their joint attack with Israeli forces to decapitate the Iranian leadership and paralyse its military. The military attacks were successful. The predictions about the political cause-and-effect to follow were not. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 美國在與以色列共同對伊朗發動的軍事行動已經持續八週，這一行動的初衷是削弱伊朗的軍事能力並推翻其領導層。然而，儘管軍事攻擊取得了一定的成功，政治後果卻未如預期。美國目前面臨兩難局面，既要避免達成可能突顯其在伊朗失敗的協議，又需考慮是否重新開放霍爾木茲海峽，這對伊朗來說可能比核武器更具價值。
briefing.background: 美國與伊朗之間的緊張關係由來已久，尤其是在美國對伊朗實施經濟制裁的背景下。霍爾木茲海峽是全球重要的石油運輸通道，控制該地區的能力對於兩國的戰略意圖至關重要。美國的軍事行動旨在削弱伊朗的影響力，但隨著時間推移，這些行動的政治效果卻未能如預期般顯現，反而使得美國在國際社會中的立場更加脆弱。
briefing.analysis: 美國目前面臨的困境在於，若繼續維持對伊朗的經濟封鎖，可能會導致長期的經濟戰，甚至引發更大規模的軍事衝突。根據《The Hindu International》的報導，解除封鎖可能是促進對話的關鍵，而《Al Jazeera》則指出，特朗普已經收到伊朗方面的要求，希望美方能解除對其港口的海軍封鎖。這顯示出伊朗在談判中的主動性，並可能影響美國的決策。各方的利益在此時交織，未來的發展將取決於美國是否願意調整其策略，以避免進一步的軍事升級。

supporting_titles: ​Battle of wills: On the U.S. war on Iran
Iran war live: Trump threatens Iran to ‘get smart soon’ amid stalled talks
supporting_summaries: The U.S. should lift its blockade so that Iran can open the Strait of Hormuz
US president says Iran has reached out and asked Washington to lift its naval blockade on Iranian ports.

economy.title: Lloyds takes £151m hit from Iran war as it forecasts rise in UK unemployment
economy.summary: Bank expects its base case for GDP growth to be 0.5% this year, lower than IMF’s 0.8% prediction for Britain Business live – latest updates Lloyds has warned that the economic fallout from the Middle East conflict could cost it £151m amid rising unemployment and inflation and a slowdown in the housing market. The FTSE 100 group, whose brands include Lloyds Bank, Halifax and Bank of Scotland, issued a downbeat economic forecast that it said reflects the stagflationary consequences – the double hit of rising inflation at the same time as slower economic growth – for the UK and global economies. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: Bank expects its base case for GDP growth to be 0.5% this year, lower than IMF’s 0.8% prediction for Britain Business live – latest updates Lloyds has warned that the economic fallout from the Middle East conflict could cost it £151m amid rising unemployment and inflation and a slowdown in the housing market. The FTSE 100 group, whose brands include Lloyds Bank, Halifax and Bank of Scotland, issued a downbeat economic forecast that it said reflects the stagflationary consequences – the double hit of rising inflation at the same time as slower economic growth – for the UK and global economies. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: Lloyds銀行預測，由於中東衝突的經濟影響，將面臨1.51億英鎊的損失，並預測英國失業率上升。該行的GDP增長預測為0.5%，低於國際貨幣基金組織的0.8%預測。Lloyds指出，這反映了英國及全球經濟的滯脹後果，即在經濟增長放緩的同時，通脹上升的雙重打擊。
briefing.background: Lloyds銀行是英國主要的金融機構之一，其業務涵蓋多個品牌，包括Lloyds Bank、Halifax和Bank of Scotland。近期中東地區的衝突加劇，對全球經濟造成了不確定性，特別是在能源價格和供應鏈方面。英國經濟正面臨通脹上升和增長放緩的挑戰，這使得金融機構如Lloyds必須重新評估其經濟預測和風險管理策略。根據IMF的預測，英國的經濟增長將低於預期，這可能進一步影響消費者信心和投資活動。
briefing.analysis: Lloyds銀行的預測顯示出中東衝突對經濟的直接影響，特別是在失業和通脹上升的背景下。該行的損失預測反映了其對未來經濟環境的悲觀態度，尤其是在房地產市場放緩的情況下。參考報導指出，儘管Lloyds銀行的利潤上升了33%，但其對未來的警告顯示出經濟不確定性對金融機構的影響。與此同時，The Economist的報導提到可再生能源在此背景下的吸引力上升，顯示出市場對能源政策的重新評估。這些不同的焦點反映出各方對經濟前景的不同看法，Lloyds專注於短期風險，而其他報導則可能更關注長期的能源轉型。

Renewables are shining. The Iran war amplifies their appeal

economy.title: China oil stocks rise as crude rally lifts Sinopec, CNOOC earnings
economy.summary: Chinese oil producers have seen market gains after two of the country’s major players reported stronger first-quarter earnings, buoyed by a surge in crude prices. Shares of China Petroleum and Chemical Corp, also known as Sinopec, rose 2.4 per cent to HK$4.70 in Hong Kong, while its Shanghai-listed stock gained 1.3 per cent to 5.42 yuan. China National Overseas Oil Corporation (CNOOC) climbed 1.4 per cent to HK$29.38 and PetroChina rallied 2.7 per cent to HK$11.98. Oil stocks have been in focus...

briefing.news_focus: Chinese oil producers have seen market gains after two of the country’s major players reported stronger first-quarter earnings, buoyed by a surge in crude prices. Shares of China Petroleum and Chemical Corp, also known as Sinopec, rose 2.4 per cent to HK$4.70 in Hong Kong, while its Shanghai-listed stock gained 1.3 per cent to 5.42 yuan. China National Overseas Oil Corporation (CNOOC) climbed 1.4 per cent to HK$29.38 and PetroChina rallied 2.7 per cent to HK$11.98. Oil stocks have been in focus...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 中國主要石油生產商在報告第一季度強勁的收益後，股價出現上漲。中國石油化工股份有限公司（Sinopec）的股價在香港上漲2.4%至4.70港元，上海上市的股價也上漲1.3%至5.42元人民幣。中國海洋石油總公司（CNOOC）股價上漲1.4%至29.38港元，而中國石油天然氣股份有限公司（PetroChina）則上漲2.7%至11.98港元。這一現象主要受到原油價格飆升的推動。
briefing.background: 近期，全球原油價格的上漲對中國的石油行業產生了積極影響。隨著需求回升和供應鏈的逐步恢復，國際市場對原油的需求持續增長。中國作為全球最大的石油進口國，其主要石油公司如Sinopec、CNOOC和PetroChina在此背景下受益，報告的收益增長顯示出它們在市場中的競爭力。此外，中國政府對能源安全的重視，也促使這些企業加大投資以提升產能。
briefing.analysis: 中國石油股價的上漲反映了市場對於原油價格持續回暖的樂觀預期。Sinopec和CNOOC的強勁收益不僅提升了投資者的信心，也可能促使其他相關企業跟進，進一步推動整個行業的增長。然而，市場也需警惕原油價格波動可能帶來的風險，尤其是在地緣政治緊張局勢影響下。此外，參考報導提到的中國對穩定幣的興趣，雖然與石油股無直接關聯，但顯示出中國在金融科技領域的探索，可能影響未來的資本流動與投資策略。

economy.title: Why UAE’s exit from Opec is good news for Asia’s energy security
economy.summary: Asia’s oil import-dependent economies will benefit from the United Arab Emirates’ (UAE) exit from Opec, though the ongoing closure of the arterial Strait of Hormuz may not offer any immediate relief from soaring prices, analysts say. Global oil prices continued to surge on Wednesday, with benchmark Brent crude oil prices hitting US$111 a barrel and US West Texas Intermediate (WTI) approaching US$100 a barrel. Before the Iran war, Brent was trading around US$70 a barrel, while WTI was about US$65...

briefing.news_focus: Asia’s oil import-dependent economies will benefit from the United Arab Emirates’ (UAE) exit from Opec, though the ongoing closure of the arterial Strait of Hormuz may not offer any immediate relief from soaring prices, analysts say. Global oil prices continued to surge on Wednesday, with benchmark Brent crude oil prices hitting US$111 a barrel and US West Texas Intermediate (WTI) approaching US$100 a barrel. Before the Iran war, Brent was trading around US$70 a barrel, while WTI was about US$65...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 阿拉伯聯合大公國（UAE）宣布將於5月1日結束其近60年的石油輸出國組織（OPEC）會員資格，這一決定被認為將有利於亞洲依賴石油進口的經濟體。儘管如此，霍爾木茲海峽的持續封閉可能不會立即緩解油價飆升的壓力。近期，布倫特原油價格已達每桶111美元，而美國西德克薩斯中質原油（WTI）接近每桶100美元，顯示出市場的高度波動性。
briefing.background: UAE的OPEC退出是在全球能源市場極為不穩定的背景下進行的。隨著地緣政治緊張局勢加劇，特別是伊朗與其他國家的衝突，油價持續上漲。UAE的決定使其能夠在這一波動的市場中提高產量，這對於依賴石油進口的亞洲國家來說，可能是一個利好消息。儘管如此，霍爾木茲海峽的封閉仍然是影響油價的重要因素，這一海域是全球主要的石油運輸通道。
briefing.analysis: UAE的退出可能會使其能夠自主調整產量，從而在全球油價高漲的情況下，為亞洲市場提供更多的供應選擇。這對於依賴石油的亞洲經濟體來說，無疑是一個積極的信號。然而，根據參考報導，霍爾木茲海峽的持續封閉對油價的影響更為顯著，這可能會抵消UAE退出OPEC所帶來的潛在好處。各方利益關係中，UAE希望通過提高產量來增強其市場地位，而亞洲國家則希望能夠獲得穩定的能源供應以應對高漲的油價。未來，若霍爾木茲海峽的情況未能改善，則即使UAE的產量增加，亞洲國家的能源安全仍可能面臨挑戰。

supporting_titles: UAE to Exit OPEC After Nearly 60 Years
Oil ends up nearly 3% as Hormuz disruption outweighs UAE OPEC exit - Reuters
supporting_summaries: On May 1, the United Arab Emirates will end its a 59-year membership in the oil consortium, allowing it to raise output during one of the most volatile energy markets in years.
